prompt: Golden-hour luxury editorial beach portrait, breathtakingly beautiful woman with sun-kissed luminous skin, dark silky hair swept by a gentle breeze, wearing a flowing backless burnt-orange silk halter gown clinging to her feminine curves, one arm lifted brushing hair from face revealing an elegant side profile, soft knowing half-smile, eyes half-closed, barefoot on warm sand, ocean horizon blurred into creamy amber-and-lavender bokeh, warm backlight creating a luminous hair halo, large silver reflector filling face, lens flare at frame edge, Contax 645 medium format 80mm f/2.0 Portra 400 emulation, 8k resolution, photorealistic, cinematic composition, high detail, no harsh lighting, no over-saturated skin, no plastic retouching, no blown highlights, no cluttered background.
promptEn: Golden-hour luxury editorial beach portrait, breathtakingly beautiful woman with sun-kissed luminous skin, dark silky hair swept by a gentle breeze, wearing a flowing backless burnt-orange silk halter gown clinging to her feminine curves, one arm lifted brushing hair from face revealing an elegant side profile, soft knowing half-smile, eyes half-closed, barefoot on warm sand, ocean horizon blurred into creamy amber-and-lavender bokeh, warm backlight creating a luminous hair halo, large silver reflector filling face, lens flare at frame edge, Contax 645 medium format 80mm f/2.0 Portra 400 emulation, 8k resolution, photorealistic, cinematic composition, high detail, no harsh lighting, no over-saturated skin, no plastic retouching, no blown highlights, no cluttered background.
promptZh: 黄金时刻奢华时尚大片 海滩人像，令人惊叹的美丽女性，拥有被阳光亲吻过的透亮肌肤，深色丝滑秀发在微风中拂动，身着一件 飘逸的露背焦橙色丝绸挂脖长裙，勾勒出女性柔美的曲线，单手抬起撩拨发丝，露出 优雅的侧脸，带着柔和且心领神会的浅笑，双眼微闭，赤脚踩在温暖的沙滩上，海平线虚化成奶油般的琥珀色与淡紫色光斑，温暖的逆光在发丝间形成光晕，大型银色反光板补光，画面边缘带有镜头光晕，Contax 645 中画幅 80mm f/2.0 Portra 400 胶片质感，8k 分辨率，照片级真实感，电影级构图，高细节，无生硬光线，无过度饱和肤色，无塑料感修图，无过曝高光，背景简洁。
